logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Starting Jira sync script and setting up monitoring
logs.content:
{
    "thoughts": [
        "User wants to run the Jira script with specific filter and view IDs.",
        "Script may take 5-15 minutes, so I need to start it in background and monitor.",
        "I'll use code_execution_tool to run the script without blocking.",
        "Then set up monitoring loop to check progress every 30 seconds (up to 10 times).",
        "On completion or failure, trigger notification via notify.py."
    ],

    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "terminal",

        "reset": false,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py --filter-id 13811 --view-id 10489904 > /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log 2>&1 &\necho \"Started script with PID $!\"\ncat /a0/usr/workdir/jira.pid"
    }
}
